title: First Strike
overview: Jordan Tyler has the skill of a Ninja.... with telepathic powers.... He can see the future.... Mankind is at its end.... A fatal airborne flesh-eating virus has been unleashed.... The future can change.... Destiny is calling.... This year, our Enemies strike first.... "First Strike" .... you can hide from what you can't see.
